name: Kafrit Industries (1993) Ltd
summary: Kafrit Industries (1993) Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells customized masterbatches and compounds for the plastic industry worldwide. The company offers masterbatches and compounds for polycarbonate and PMMA sheets, halogen free solutions for sheets and pipes, agricultural films, polyethylene packaging polypropylene cast and calender films, and blowing agents. It also provides CONSTAB and CONPEEL compounds, injection/blow moldings, and antioxidants; Ecocell, a revolutionary foaming agent to reduce material and resin consumption; BOPE, a sustainable solution for flexible packaging films; and antimony free/reduced antimony FR solutions. The company offers its products for various applications, such as packaging films, including BOPP, CPP, and PE, as well as PC sheet, agricultural derivatives, biopolymers, flame retardant, PEX pipes, fibers, and nonwovens. Kafrit Industries (1993) Ltd was founded in 1973 and is based in Sha'ar HaNegev, Israel.
